text:
Created attachment 226204
notcurses 2.3.6 -> 2.3.8 git diff

Update devel/notcurses from 2.3.6 -> 2.3.8.

https://github.com/dankamongmen/notcurses/releases/tag/v2.3.8
https://github.com/dankamongmen/notcurses/releases/tag/v2.3.7

there's a compiler warning in the output on FreeBSD about ignoring the result of a function marked pure; this has been fixed upstream, but it is harmless.
